div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: 5 · Materialize — user-gated, only on LiveFetch payload cap

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: 4 · Per query — verify before execute, max 2 revise retries on any DuneSQL error; datasets never enter agent context

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: 3 · Skills — loaded from spec; technique docs pull leaf files (api-defillama, chain-solana, …)
